heading: Funding
label: 300ee–24 Funding
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2514 of act , was successively renumbered by subsequent acts, see .July 1, 1944section 238m of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: a Authorization of appropriations
children.text: For the purpose of making allotments under , there are authorized to be appropriated $165,000,000 for fiscal year 1989 and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1990 and 1991.section 300ee–11(a) of this title

children.heading: Availability to States
children.label: b Availability to States
children.text: Any amounts paid to a State under shall remain available to the State until the expiration of the 1-year period beginning on the date on which the State receives such amounts.section 300ee–11(a) of this title
